# 第四部分：深度理解与语言支持

## 1. 术语解析

### **Anomaly-free**

**Anomaly-free** 不是“没有任何非平凡结构”，而是指 anomaly index  
\[
[\omega]\in H^3[G,U(1)]
\]
为零，等价于不存在 gauging obstruction。语境中关键含义是：可选择 fusion-operator 相位规范，使所有 \(F_j(g,h,k)=1\)。微妙之处在于 anomaly-free 不等于原 symmetry 已经 on-site；例如 CZ symmetry 无异常但不加 ancillae 不能 disentangle。

### **On-site symmetry**

**On-site symmetry** 指全局 symmetry operator 可分解为每个 site 上局域表示的张量积：
\[
U^g=\bigotimes_j u_j^g.
\]
在文中，on-site 是 range \(k=0\) 的 locality-preserving symmetry。微妙之处在于：FDQC 共轭后的 on-site 与原始 microscopic on-site 不同；通过局域变量变换可以改变 on-site 性。

### **Disentangler**

**Disentangler** 指一个 finite-depth quantum circuit \(\mathcal W\)，通过共轭变换消除 symmetry operator 中的非局域纠缠结构。这里的核心等式是
\[
\mathcal W^\dagger(U^g\otimes\mathcal X^g)\mathcal W
=
\mathbb1\otimes\mathcal X^g.
\]
“Disentangle” 不是把量子态变成 product state，而是把 **symmetry action** 的纠缠结构剥离到辅助 on-site 自由度上。

### **Onsiteability**

**Onsiteability** 指某个 locality-preserving symmetry 是否能通过允许操作变成 on-site symmetry。允许操作包括加入 on-site ancilla symmetry 和 FDQC conjugation。该词微妙地表示“稳定意义下的 on-site 化可能性”，而不是原 Hilbert 空间上直接 on-site。

### **Fusion operator**

**Fusion operator** \(\lambda_j(g,h)\) 是局域酉算符，用于把相邻的 \(g\)、\(h\) symmetry defects 融合成 \(gh\) defect。它不是群乘法本身，而是 defect fusion 在晶格 Hilbert 空间上的局域实现。其相位不唯一，异常正是从这些相位在 associativity 中的不一致性抽取出来。

---

## 2. 疑难查证

### **为什么 anomaly index 位于 \(H^3[G,U(1)]\)**

在 1D 边界上，有限群 symmetry defects 可视为拓扑线的端点或 domain wall。fusion operator 描述两个 defects 如何合并。三个 group elements \(g,h,k\) 的融合有两种括号方式：
\[
g(hk)
\quad\text{与}\quad
(gh)k.
\]
两种路径若只差一个相位 \(F(g,h,k)\)，则这些相位必须满足 pentagon consistency。pentagon equation 正是 group cohomology 中 3-cocycle 条件。若 \(F\) 可由重新定义 fusion-operator 相位消去，则 cocycle 是 coboundary，\([\omega]=0\)。若消不去，则 anomaly 非平凡。

### **为什么加入 ancillae 是合理的**

在量子相分类中，允许加入 decoupled trivial degrees of freedom 是稳定等价的标准做法。一个物理系统的微观 Hilbert 空间并不唯一；可加入不参与低能动力学的局域自由度。若一个对称性只有在加入这些 inert degrees of freedom 后才 on-site，这说明其非 on-site 性不是异常，而是 Hilbert-space presentation 的稳定伪影。

CZ-chain 例子说明这一点：  
\[
U=\prod_j\mathrm{CZ}_{j,j+1}
\]
有平庸对称哈密顿量  
\[
H=-\sum_j Z_j,
\]
所以无 LSM obstruction；但原 Hilbert 空间上无法由 FDQC 直接变成 on-site。加入每站点一个 ancilla qubit 后，\(\prod_j\mathrm{CCZ}_j\) 即可 disentangle。

### **为什么 Gauss’s law operators 是关键**

\(\mathcal G_j^g\) 同时作用于物理链与辅助 group-valued spins，像 lattice gauge theory 中的局部 gauge transformation。若 anomaly-free，则所有 \(\mathcal G_j^g\) 构成彼此兼容的局域 gauge constraints：
\[
[\mathcal G_j^g,\mathcal G_{j'}^h]=0,
\quad
\mathcal G_j^g\mathcal G_j^h=\mathcal G_j^{gh}.
\]
这意味着可以一致地“局域 gauging” 该 symmetry。disentangler \(\mathcal W\) 本质上就是把原 symmetry operator 解释为 gauge transformation 的边界效应，然后通过辅助 gauge degrees of freedom 将其吸收。

### **为什么无异常推出 trivially gapped Hamiltonian**

若
\[
\mathcal W^\dagger(U^g\otimes\mathcal X^g)\mathcal W
=
\mathbb1\otimes\mathcal X^g,
\]
则变换后 symmetry 只作用在 ancillae 上，且是 on-site。可以选择一个唯一 product ground state 的 on-site symmetric Hamiltonian，例如让 ancillae 处于对 left multiplication 对称的不变态，并让物理自由度处于平庸 product state。再用 \(\mathcal W\) 共轭回去，得到原 symmetry 下对称、唯一、短程纠缠、有能隙的 Hamiltonian。这正是 generalized LSM theorem 的逆命题。

---

# 第五部分：创新评估与关联

## 1. 创新性判断

### **从必要条件提升为充分条件**

过去 2–5 年相关工作已将 spin-chain anomalies 与 gauging obstruction、SPT boundary anomaly、LSM constraints 联系起来。例如 Seifnashri 2024 给出非 on-site symmetry gauging obstruction 的系统公式；Kapustin–Sopenko 2024 将 anomalous spin-chain symmetries 与广义 LSM 定理联系起来；Bols 等 2025 发展 locality-preserving symmetries 分类。核心未闭合问题是：

\[
[\omega]=0
\quad\Rightarrow\quad
\text{stable onsiteability?}
\]

该研究给出肯定答案，并提供显式 FDQC，而非仅给出抽象分类。

### **解决“无异常但非 on-site”之间的缺口**

此前 lore 常说 anomaly-free symmetries 是 on-site 或可变为 on-site，但缺乏一般证明，尤其在需要 ancillae 的情形下不明显。CZ-chain 反例显示“不加 ancillae 的可 on-site 化”是错误命题。该研究精确修正为：

\[
\text{anomaly-free}
\quad\Longleftrightarrow\quad
\text{on-site after adding ancillae and FDQC conjugation}.
\]

这把 folklore 变成严格稳定等价定理。

### **显式 disentangling circuit 是技术核心**

创新不只是存在性证明，而是给出具体线路：
\[
\mathcal W_j
=
\sum_{s,t\in G}
\lambda_j(s,\bar s t)
\otimes
|s,t\rangle\langle s,t|_{j,j+1},
\]
并进一步化为 finite-depth 形式：
\[
\prod_{j\ \mathrm{even}}(\cdots)
\prod_{j\ \mathrm{odd}}(\cdots).
\]
该构造把 group cohomology trivialization、defect fusion、Gauss law 与 quantum circuit 直接连接。

### **建立 LSM converse**

已有 LSM-type theorem 通常为：
\[
[\omega]\ne0
\Rightarrow
\text{no trivial symmetric gapped phase}.
\]
该研究证明反向：
\[
[\omega]=0
\Rightarrow
\text{exists unique SRE symmetric gapped phase}
\]
在 finite internal symmetry、1D spin chain、允许 ancillae 的条件下成立。由此 LSM anomaly 与 SPT bulk-boundary anomaly 在该范围内完全等价。

### **补齐 boundary-to-bulk 方向**

SPT bulk-boundary correspondence 通常从 bulk SPT 推导 boundary anomaly。该研究反向给出：任意 anomalous spin-chain symmetry 都可构造 2+1D SPT bulk 来实现其边界作用。该方向此前缺少显式通用 recipe；现在通过交替取向链阵列与两层 FDQC entangler 实现。

### **限定范围清晰，避免过度推广**

新颖性同时伴随明确边界：有限群、1D、内部对称性。高维中存在 beyond anomaly index 的额外 obstruction，连续群尚未证明，generalized symmetries 仍开放。因此该结果不是“所有 anomaly-free symmetries 都可 on-site 化”的普遍定理，而是 **1D finite internal symmetry** 情形下的完整定理。

items.title_en: Physical Mechanism behind the Early Onset of the Ultimate State in Supergravitational Centrifugal Thermal Convection

poster_elements.研究问题: 超重力离心热对流中，热湍流为何能在远低于经典 Rayleigh-Bénard 对流的 Rayleigh 数下提前进入“终极态”？核心是揭示经典态到终极态转变的触发机制：残余地球重力如何在高速旋转的环形对流腔内改变近壁边界层稳定性，并导致传热突然增强。
poster_elements.创新方法: Aha 点是把“残余地球重力”从实验误差变成关键物理机制：地球重力垂直于离心浮力，打破上下对称性，在内冷外热圆柱壁附近诱导两条沿轴向拉伸的 Stewartson 涡层；当 Stewartson 层厚度与黏性边界层厚度相当时，两种边界层在近壁区域强耦合，扭曲原本层流型黏性边界层，触发其湍流化，从而提前进入终极传热态。
poster_elements.工作流程: 输入为高速旋转圆柱环隙装置：内圆柱冷却、外圆柱加热，改变转速与温差得到不同 Froude 数 Fr 和 Rayleigh 数 Ra；实验测量热输入并计算 Nusselt 数 Nu，绘制 Nu-Ra 与补偿曲线以识别转变点；用样条插值确定临界 Ra*；再通过三维直接数值模拟提取近壁轴向速度与方位速度剖面，分别计算 Stewartson 层厚度 δst 和黏性边界层厚度 δν；最后用尺度关系 δst/L∼Fr^-1/6、δν/L∼Ra^-1/4 推导并验证 Ra*∼Fr^2/3。
poster_elements.关键结果: 实验覆盖 Fr=1.78–56.2、Ra=1.76×10^9–3.04×10^11，发现传热标度从经典态 Nu∼Ra^0.27 突变为终极态 Nu∼Ra^0.46；临界 Rayleigh 数随 Froude 数增大而升高，满足 Ra*∼Fr^2/3，例如 Fr=1.78 时 Ra*约为 9×10^9，而 Fr=56.2 时接近 8×10^10；归一化后不同 Fr 数据坍缩成两条主曲线；数值模拟显示 δst/δν 随 Fr^-1/6Ra^1/4 增长，临界转变时 δst/δν 平均约 0.78，接近边界层厚度相当的理论判据。
poster_elements.应用价值: 该研究给出了终极热湍流提前出现的可视化物理图像：残余重力诱导的 Stewartson 层像一把近壁“扰动刀片”，切入黏性边界层并促使其湍流化；这为在实验室实现极端天体、地幔、大气和旋转工程设备中的高 Rayleigh 数热对流提供了机制依据，也为旋转换热器、涡轮机械腔体、强离心场热管理等系统中利用边界层耦合增强传热提供设计思路。

items.deep_analysis:
## 第一部分：核心概览

该研究揭示了超重力离心热对流中**终极态湍流提前出现**的物理机制：残余地球重力在冷热圆柱壁附近诱导**Stewartson 层**，当其厚度与**黏性边界层**相当时，两类边界层强耦合并扰动原本层流型边界层，触发向湍流边界层转变，从而使传热指数由经典态的 **γ = 0.27** 跃升至终极态的 **γ = 0.46**。实验覆盖 **Fr = 1.78–56.2**、**Ra_r = 1.76×10⁹–3.04×10¹¹**，并发现临界 Rayleigh 数满足 **Ra_r\* ∼ Fr^{2/3}**。该结果把离心对流中低阈值终极态从经验观测推进到边界层相互作用机制解释，补足了经典 RBC 中长期存在的转捩机制缺口。

---

## 第二部分：结构化快速回顾

《Physical Mechanism behind the Early Onset of the Ultimate State in Supergravitational Centrifugal Thermal Convection》（Lei Ren, Jun Zhong, Rushi Lai, and Chao Sun，2026）

### 背景

热湍流在地幔、大气和工业旋转腔体中广泛存在。经典 Rayleigh-Bénard convection 难以在实验室达到地球物理和天体物理尺度的极高 **Ra**，而离心热对流通过旋转产生沿温度梯度方向的有效重力，可进入更高 **Ra**。此前已经观测到离心对流中终极态出现在 **Ra\* = O(10¹⁰)**，显著低于经典 RBC 的 **Ra\* = O(10¹²–10¹⁴)**，但提前转捩机制尚不清楚。

### 方法

采用圆柱环隙离心对流装置：内壁冷却、外壁加热，整体绕竖直轴固体旋转。几何参数为 **R_i = 120 mm**、**R_o = 240 mm**、**H = 120 mm**、**L = 120 mm**、**η = 0.5**、**Γ = 1**。工作流体为 **Silicone oil-1cs**，**Pr = 16.4**。共进行 **60 组实验**，覆盖 **ΔT = 2.77–21.35 K**、**Ra_r = 1.76×10⁹–3.04×10¹¹**、转速 **94–528 rpm**、等效重力 **1.78g–56.2g**。同时进行三维直接数值模拟，低 **Ra_r** 范围为 **10⁶–4.64×10⁸**。

### 结果

低 **Ra_r** 区域传热遵循 **Nu ∼ Ra_r^0.27**，对应经典态；高 **Ra_r** 区域传热指数增大到 **γ = 0.46**，与终极态理论趋势一致。转捩在所有 **Fr** 下稳健出现，但临界 **Ra_r\*** 随 **Fr** 降低而降低：例如 **Fr = 1.78** 时 **Ra_r\* ≈ 9×10⁹**，**Fr = 56.2** 时 **Ra_r\* ≈ 8×10¹⁰**。实验得到 **Ra_r\* ∼ Fr^{2/3}**。

### 讨论

残余地球重力打破纯离心对流的上下对称性，在冷热圆柱壁附近产生轴向涡结构和 **Stewartson layers**。理论关系为 **δ_st/L ∼ Ek^{1/3}**，实验条件下 **Ek ∼ Fr^{-1/2}**，因此 **δ_st/L ∼ Fr^{-1/6}**；黏性边界层厚度满足 **δ_ν/L ∼ Ra^{-1/4}**。令 **δ_st ∼ δ_ν** 得到 **Ra\* ∼ Fr^{2/3}**，与实验完全一致。DNS 得到 **δ_st/δ_ν = 0.0021 Fr^{-1/6} Ra_r^0.26**，指数 **0.26** 接近理论 **1/4**。

### 局限

DNS 只能达到 **Ra_r = 10⁶–4.64×10⁸**，低于实验转捩区间；边界层耦合机制主要依赖低 **Ra_r** 外推和尺度一致性。高 **Ra_r** 下直接解析 Stewartson 层与黏性边界层仍然困难，实验面临边界层厚度极小、测量分辨率不足的问题，三维 DNS 面临计算量过大问题。

### 结论

离心对流终极态提前出现的关键不是单纯的离心浮力增强，而是**残余地球重力诱导的 Stewartson 层与黏性边界层相互作用**。当 **δ_st/δ_ν ≈ 0.78** 时，边界层稳定性由单一黏性边界层控制转为耦合边界层控制，局部速度各向异性增强，层流边界层失稳并转为湍流，热边界层被持续扰动，传热显著增强。

---

## 第三部分：逐章节冷凝解析

# Physical Mechanism behind the Early Onset of the Ultimate State in Supergravitational Centrifugal Thermal Convection

## Abstract

### **Combined experiment–simulation strategy identifies the transition mechanism**

核心贡献建立在**实验测量**与**直接数值模拟**结合之上，目标是解析超重力离心对流中从**经典态 classical regime**到**终极态 ultimate regime**的转变。摘要明确写道：*"We present a combined experimental and numerical investigation of the transition from the classical to the ultimate regime of thermal turbulence in a supergravitational centrifugal convection system."* 这一表述限定了问题对象：不是一般 RBC，而是**supergravitational centrifugal convection system**；不是单纯传热标度测量，而是**transition mechanism**。

### **Critical Rayleigh number decreases as Froude number decreases**

转捩阈值对 **Froude number Fr** 敏感，且呈系统变化：**Fr 越小，Ra\* 越低**。摘要中给出的关键事实是：*"the critical Rayleigh number decreasing systematically as the Froude number, defined as the ratio of centrifugal to Earth's gravity, decreases, highlighting the effect of residual gravity."* 这里 **Fr** 被定义为**离心加速度与地球重力之比**，因此低 **Fr** 意味着残余地球重力相对更强。

### **Stewartson layer–viscous boundary layer interaction triggers ultimate-state onset**

转捩发生在 **Stewartson layer** 厚度与**黏性边界层 viscous boundary layer**厚度相当时。摘要中的机制链条非常明确：*"Once the Rayleigh number reaches the transition threshold, the Stewartson layer induced by residual Earth gravity becomes comparable in thickness to the viscous boundary layer, and their interaction results in a coupled flow that distorts the viscous boundary layer, triggering its transition from laminar to turbulent flow and leading to a sharp increase in heat transport."* 关键逻辑为：残余重力 → Stewartson 层 → 与黏性边界层厚度匹配 → 耦合流 → 黏性边界层畸变 → 层流到湍流 → 传热跃升。

---

## Introduction

### **Thermal turbulence requires asymptotic scaling because natural systems exceed laboratory Ra**

热驱动湍流广泛存在于自然与工程系统中，但地球物理和天体物理流动的驱动强度远高于实验可达范围，因此需要依赖高 **Ra** 极限的标度理论。开篇指出：*"Turbulent flows driven by thermal forcing are ubiquitous in nature [1,2] and in industrial processes [3]."* 随后强调实验局限：*"In geophysical and astrophysical systems, the driving strength of these flows reaches extremely high values that cannot be reproduced in laboratory experiments."* 这构成了研究终极态的根本动机。

### **Rayleigh-Bénard convection provides the canonical framework**

经典 **Rayleigh-Bénard convection, RBC** 是研究热对流湍流的标准模型，其几何为上下水平板夹持流体，下热上冷。原文定义为：*"Rayleigh-Bénard convection (RBC), which consists of a fluid layer confined between two horizontal plates, heated from below and cooled from above."* 在该框架中，**Nusselt number Nu** 度量无量纲传热，**Rayleigh number Ra** 度量浮力驱动强度：*"the relation between the Nusselt number Nu (a dimensionless measure of convective heat transport) and the Rayleigh number Ra (a dimensionless measure of buoyancy driving) provides a powerful framework for exploring these flows."*

### **Ultimate-regime theory predicts effective exponent above 1/3 and asymptotic approach to 1/2**

Kraichnan 的经典预言给出终极态传热标度 **Nu ∼ Ra^{1/2}(ln Ra)^{-3/2}**。原文写道：*"Kraichnan [8] first predicted that, at sufficiently large Ra, turbulent flow enters the so-called ultimate regime, in which the Nusselt number scales as Nu ∼ Ra^{1/2} (ln Ra)^{-3/2}."* 新近 Shishkina–Lohse 模型纳入 **Prandtl number Pr** 并满足严格上界条件：*"yielding the scaling relation Nu ∼ Pr^{±1/2} Ra^{1/2} (log Ra)^{-2}, with a negative exponent (-1/2) for Pr ≥ 1 and a positive exponent (+1/2) for Pr ≤ 1."* 两类理论的共同预测为：终极态有效指数 **γ > 1/3**，并在极高 **Ra** 下趋近 **1/2**：*"Both models predict that the effective scaling exponent γ in the relation Nu ∼ Ra^γ exceeds 1/3 in the ultimate regime... and asymptotically approaches 1/2 at very large Ra."*

### **Classical RBC has struggled to provide decisive broad-range evidence**

过去 60 年终极态是否存在一直存在争论，涉及理论与实验大量工作。原文概括为：*"Over the past 60 years, the existence of the ultimate regime has been the subject of intensive debate and extensive investigation in theory [8-15] and in laboratory experiments [11,13,16-23]."* 经典 RBC 的主要问题是难以达到足够高 **Ra** 并在宽范围内获得令人信服证据：*"in classical RBC systems, where Earth's gravity is aligned with the temperature gradient, it remains challenging to reach extremely high Ra and to obtain convincing evidence across a wide Ra range."*

### **Centrifugal convection bypasses the Ra limitation by using centrifugal acceleration as effective gravity**

超重力离心对流 **centrifugal convection, CC** 通过旋转产生沿温度梯度方向的离心加速度，而地球重力垂直于温度梯度。原文写道：*"Jiang et al. [22] introduced a supergravitational centrifugal convection (CC) system, in which centrifugal acceleration acts as an effective gravity parallel to the temperature gradient, while Earth's gravity is perpendicular to it."* 这一几何配置允许实验达到更高 **Ra**，并已经在超过一个数量级的 **Ra** 范围内提供终极态直接证据：*"The configuration of CC enables access to much larger Ra and has provided direct evidence for the existence of the ultimate regime over more than a decade in Ra [23]."*

### **CC differs fundamentally from rotating RBC in rotation-axis geometry**

离心对流与旋转 RBC **RRBC** 虽然都涉及旋转，但旋转轴与温度梯度相对方向不同。原文强调：*"the key difference is the direction of the rotation axis and the temperature gradient."* 在 RRBC 中，旋转轴、温度梯度与浮力方向一致，强旋转显著抑制对流；在 CC 中，强旋转对传热影响较小：*"In RRBC, the rotation axis is aligned with the temperature gradient as well as the buoyancy, in which a strong rotation has a great depression on convection [34], but has little effect on the heat transport in CC [22]."* 因此两者流动结构不同：*"the flow structures, i.e., the boundary zonal flow and the Taylor columns in RRBC, are different from those in CC."*

### **The unresolved problem is why CC reaches the ultimate regime much earlier than RBC**

核心科学问题是离心对流为何在 **Ra\* = O(10¹⁰)** 就进入终极态，而经典 RBC 需 **Ra\* = O(10¹²–10¹⁴)**。原文提出：*"what physical mechanisms govern this transition, and why does it occur at a much lower threshold in the CC system [Ra* = O(10^{10})] [22,23] than in the classical RBC system [Ra* = O(10^{12-14})] [7,13,21]?"* 这也是全文的中心创新点。

### **Residual Earth gravity induces Stewartson layers that may destabilize boundary layers**

近期工作显示地球重力会在 CC 中诱导冷热壁附近的 **Stewartson layers**。原文写道：*"Lai et al. [36] investigated the influence of Earth's gravity on turbulent flow in the CC system and demonstrated that the Stewartson layers [37,38] forming near the inner (cooled) and outer (heated) cylinders are induced by Earth's gravity."* 终极态转捩理论上对应**层流型 Prandtl-Blasius 边界层**转为**湍流型 Prandtl-von Kármán 边界层**：*"During the transition from the classical to the ultimate regimes, the laminar-type Prandtl-Blasius boundary layer is expected to evolve into the turbulent-type Prandtl-von Kármán boundary layer through the non-normal-nonlinear mechanism."* 因此，Stewartson 层与黏性边界层的相互作用可能是关键：*"the interaction between the Stewartson layers and the viscous boundary layers near the inner (cooled) and outer (heated) cylinders may play a critical role in this transition."*

### **The measured transition is robust and Fr-dependent**

实验观察到 **Nu ∼ Ra^0.27** 的经典态转为 **γ = 0.46** 的终极态，并且这种转变在宽 **Fr** 范围稳健存在。原文给出：*"the transition from the classical regime, characterized by an effective scaling of Nu ∼ Ra^{0.27}, to the ultimate regime, with a much steeper effective exponent γ = 0.46, is robust in the CC system across a wide range of Froude numbers."* 临界 **Ra** 随 **Fr** 降低而降低，说明残余重力影响转捩：*"the critical Rayleigh number for the onset of the ultimate regime decreases as the Froude number decreases, revealing the influence of residual gravity."*

---

## Experimental setup

### **Annular rotating cell geometry fixes radius ratio and aspect ratio**

实验装置为圆柱环隙，内壁冷却、外壁加热，整体绕竖直轴固体旋转。原文描述为：*"This experimental setup is a cylindrical annulus with a cooled inner wall and a heated outer wall under a solid-body rotation around its vertical axis."* 几何尺寸非常明确：内冷壁外半径 **R_i = 120 mm**，外热壁内半径 **R_o = 240 mm**，高度 **H = 120 mm**，环隙宽度 **L = 120 mm**，半径比 **η = 0.5**，纵横比 **Γ = 1**。对应原文：*"The outer (inner) radius of the cooled inner (heated outer) wall is R_i = 120 mm (R_o = 240 mm) and the height of the cylindrical annulus is H = 120 mm, resulting in a gap of L = R_o - R_i = 120 mm, a radius ratio of η = R_i / R_o = 0.5, and an aspect ratio of Γ = H / L = 1."*

### **Froude number quantifies the strength of centrifugal acceleration relative to Earth gravity**

为研究残余重力作用，引入 **Froude number Fr = Ω²R_m/g**。其物理含义是离心加速度相对于地球重力的大小。原文定义为：*"one can take the Froude number Fr = Ω^2 R_m / g as another dimensionless parameter that is a measure of the centrifugal acceleration compared to the gravitational acceleration."* 低 **Fr** 表示地球重力相对离心力更重要，因此更容易观察重力诱导的 Stewartson 层效应。

### **Silicone oil-1cs is chosen to resolve the transition window**

工作流体为 **Silicone oil-1cs**，用于测定经典态到终极态的临界 **Ra_r\***。原文写道：*"We use Silicone oil-1cs (Shin-Etsu Chemical Co., Ltd.) as the working fluid to investigate the critical Rayleigh number Ra_r^* for the transition from the classical to the ultimate regime."* End Matter 给出其 **25°C** 物性：**α = 1.29×10⁻³ K⁻¹**、**ν = 1.00×10⁻⁶ m² s⁻¹**、**κ = 6.11×10⁻⁸ m² s⁻¹**、**λ = 0.10 W(mK)⁻¹**、**Pr = 16.4**。

---

## Measurement results

### **Heat transport shows classical scaling at low Ra and ultimate-regime scaling at high Ra**

图 1(a) 展示 **Fr = 1.78–56.2** 范围内 **Nu–Ra_r** 关系。低 **Ra_r** 区域满足 **Nu ∼ Ra_r^0.27**，与经典态一致：*"In the low-Ra_r regime, the data follow an effective scaling of Nu ∼ Ra_r^{0.27} (solid red line), consistent with the previous study [23], indicating that the system is in the classical regime."* 高 **Ra_r** 区域与终极态理论一致，包括 Shishkina–Lohse 标度 **Nu ∼ Pr^{-1/2}Ra_r^{1/2}(log Ra_r)^{-2}** 和 Kraichnan 标度 **Nu ∼ Ra_r^{1/2}(ln Ra_r)^{-3/2}**：*"In the high-Ra_r regime, the data agree with the theoretical predictions for the ultimate regime... exhibiting a steep effective scaling exponent within the current parameter range."*

### **Compensated plots reveal a robust transition from γ < 1/3 to γ > 1/3**

通过绘制 **Nu/Ra_r^{1/3}** 补偿图，转捩可见性增强。原文写道：*"For better visibility of the onset, Fig. 1(b) shows the plots compensated by Ra_r^{1/3}."* 经典态与终极态的判据是有效指数跨越 **1/3**：*"The transition from the classical to the ultimate regime is robust across all Fr, as evidenced by the change in the effective scaling exponent from γ < 1/3 to γ > 1/3."* 这避免了仅依赖绝对 **Nu** 的判断，而使用了标度指数变化作为状态转变标志。

### **Critical Ra depends strongly on Fr**

临界 **Ra_r\*** 随 **Fr** 显著改变。原文给出两个代表数值：*"For example, Ra_r^* is approximately 9 × 10^9 for Fr = 1.78, while for Fr = 56.2, it is close to 8 × 10^{10}."* 这说明相对更强的残余地球重力使终极态更早出现。其物理解释与非正规-非线性转捩一致：*"The exact onset of the steeper scaling, corresponding to the ultimate turbulence regime, depends on Fr, consistent with the view that the transition is of a non-normal-nonlinear nature... and is sensitive to perturbations induced by Earth-gravity-driven flow in the current case."*

### **Spline interpolation defines the critical Rayleigh number objectively**

临界点提取采用 **n ≥ 3** 个转捩附近数据点，在 **Nu/Ra_r^{1/3} ∼ Ra_r** 曲线上做样条插值，插值曲线最小值定义为对应 **Ra_r\*(n)**。原文方法为：*"we adopt spline interpolation with n ≥ 3 data points near the transition on the Nu / Ra_r^{1/3} ∼ Ra_r curve in Fig. 1(b) and identify the minimum value of each interpolation curve as the Ra_r^*(n)."* 最终 **Ra_r\*** 取所有 **Ra_r\*(n)** 的均值，不确定度取标准差：*"The critical Ra_r^* is obtained by the mean value of all Ra_r^*(n), and the standard deviation is used as its associated uncertainty."*

### **The transition threshold obeys Ra_r\* ∼ Fr^{2/3}**

图 1(c) 给出临界 **Ra_r\*** 与 **Fr** 的关系，结果为幂律 **Ra_r\* ∼ Fr^{2/3}**。原文写道：*"the critical Ra_r^* increases with increasing Fr, following a power law Ra_r^* ∼ Fr^{2/3}."* 因为 **Fr** 越大表示残余地球重力相对越弱，所以这一关系直接支持“地球重力诱导边界层扰动降低转捩阈值”的解释。

### **Normalized data collapse onto two master curves**

用实验得到的 **Ra_r\*** 和对应 **Nu\*** 对数据归一化后，不同 **Fr** 的数据塌缩到两条主曲线。原文写道：*"the data for different Fr now collapse onto two master curves: a scaling exponent of 0.27 for Ra_r / Ra_r^* < 1 and Nu ∼ Ra_r^{0.46} for Ra_r / Ra_r^* > 1."* 这说明不同 **Fr** 下的转捩可以通过临界尺度统一描述，具有普适标度结构：*"clearly demonstrating the universal nature of the scaling relation."*

---

## Theoretical explanation

### **Earth gravity breaks top-bottom symmetry in pure centrifugal convection**

离心对流区别于经典 RBC 的独特之处在于：离心浮力沿径向，而地球重力沿轴向，二者不共线。原文指出：*"the presence of Earth's gravitational force breaks the top-bottom symmetric structure for pure centrifugal convection without gravity."* 这种对称性破缺导致壁面附近形成轴向拉长涡结构。

### **Earth gravity generates elongated vortices and Stewartson layers near both cylinders**

地球重力导致冷热圆柱壁附近出现两个沿壁延伸的涡结构，并形成 **Stewartson layers**。原文描述为：*"two elongated vortex structures develop along the inner (cooled) and outer (heated) cylinders, leading to Stewartson layers that form near the cold and hot walls in the r-z plane, in addition to the viscous boundary layer in the r-φ plane."* 这里存在两个不同平面中的边界层：**r–φ 平面**中的黏性边界层，**r–z 平面**中的 Stewartson 层。

### **Viscous and Stewartson layer thicknesses are diagnosed from different velocity components**

两类边界层厚度的测定基于不同速度分量。原文明确写道：*"The thickness of the viscous boundary layer, δ_ν, is determined from the mainstream azimuthal velocity component, whereas the thickness of the Stewartson layer, δ_st, is determined from the axial velocity component."* 因此 **δ_ν** 反映旋转主流的方位速度边界层，**δ_st** 反映残余重力驱动的轴向流边界层。

### **Stewartson layer thickness follows Ek^{1/3}**

此前结果显示 **δ_st/L ∼ Ek^{1/3}**，与 RRBC 中 Stewartson 层理论一致。原文写道：*"the dimensionless thickness of the Stewartson layer in CC, δ_st / L, is governed by rotational effects, with δ_st / L ∼ Ek^{1 / 3}, consistent with results obtained in the RRBC system."* 其中 **Ek = ν/(ΩH²)** 表征 Coriolis 力影响：*"Here, Ek = ν / (Ω H^2) is the Ekman number, which characterizes the influence of the Coriolis force."*

### **Experimental fixed-fluid conditions imply Ek ∼ Fr^{-1/2}**

在固定 **ν, H, R_m, g** 的实验中，**Ek** 与 **Fr** 都只依赖角速度 **Ω**。原文给出定义：*"Ek = ν/(Ω H^2), Fr = Ω^2 R_m/g."* 因此有：*"both Ek and Fr only depend on Ω; then we can obtain the practical relationship between Ek and Fr in the experiments: Ek ∼ Fr^{-1/2}."* 进而得到：*"δ_st / L ∼ Ek^{1/3} ∼ Fr^{-1/6}."*

### **Viscous boundary layer thickness scales as Ra^{-1/4}**

在 RBC 或 CC 中，采用 **Re ∼ Ra^{1/2}**，并用边界层关系 **δ_ν/L ∼ Re^{-1/2}**，得到 **δ_ν/L ∼ Ra^{-1/4}**。原文写道：*"according to Re ∼ Ra^{1/2}, the thickness of the viscous boundary layer δ_ν follows δ_ν / L ∼ Re^{-1/2} ∼ Ra^{-1/4}."* 这意味着随着 **Ra** 增大，黏性边界层变薄。

### **Comparable boundary-layer thickness predicts Ra\* ∼ Fr^{2/3}**

核心理论假设是经典态到终极态的转捩发生在 **δ_ν** 与 **δ_st** 厚度相当时。原文表述为：*"assuming that the transition from the classical regime to the ultimate regime occurs when the thicknesses of the viscous boundary layer δ_ν and the Stewartson layer δ_st are comparable in scale."* 令 **Ra^{-1/4} ∼ Fr^{-1/6}**，得到 **Ra\* ∼ Fr^{2/3}**：*"Ra^{-1/4} ∼ Fr^{-1/6} ⇒ Ra^* ∼ Fr^{2/3}, which is in full agreement with the present experimental data."* 这一推导把实验幂律与边界层尺度匹配直接连接起来。

---

## Physical mechanism

### **Layer-thickness coincidence creates strongly coupled near-wall velocity components**

当 **Stewartson 层**与**黏性边界层**厚度相当时，两者速度分量在壁面附近强耦合，形成耦合流。原文提出：*"When the thicknesses of the Stewartson layer and the viscous boundary layer coincide, their velocity components strongly couple near the inner and outer cylinders, forming a coupled flow that can distort the viscous boundary layer and enhance the anisotropy of local velocity variations."* 这里的关键不是单一边界层变薄，而是不同方向速度分量在同一壁面尺度内相互作用。

### **Coupled flow destabilizes the laminar viscous boundary layer and enhances heat transport**

耦合流导致黏性边界层畸变，触发流动不稳定，最终使层流边界层破裂成湍流边界层。原文给出的完整链条是：*"This interaction can trigger flow instability, eventually leading to the breakdown of the laminar boundary layer into turbulence."* 随后湍流边界层持续扰动热边界层，使传热增强：*"The turbulent boundary layer continuously disturbs the thermal boundary layer, characterized by a significant increase in heat transport."*

### **The mechanism is analogous to boundary-layer control in rotating RBC**

这一解释与 King 等人在 RRBC 中发现的边界层厚度竞争机制类似。原文写道：*"This mechanism is similar to that reported by King et al. [25], who found that the transition between rotationally dominated and nonrotating behavior in RRBC is controlled by the relative thicknesses of the thermal (nonrotating) and Ekman (rotating) boundary layers."* 相似性在于：宏观流态转变由不同边界层厚度相对大小控制；差异在于 CC 中涉及的是 **Stewartson–viscous boundary layer interaction**，而 King 等涉及 **thermal–Ekman boundary layer interaction**。

### **DNS includes gravity and no-slip top/bottom boundaries**

为检验机制，进行三维 DNS，包含地球重力与上下端盖无滑移边界。原文写道：*"we perform three-dimensional direct numerical simulations that incorporate gravity and no-slip top and bottom boundaries, within a relatively low-Ra_r range of 10^6 ∼ 4.64 × 10^8."* 低 **Ra_r** 是重要限制，因为实验转捩发生在 **10⁹–10¹¹** 量级。

### **DNS shows δ_st/δ_ν increases with Ra_r as a power law**

在固定 **Fr = 10**、外热圆柱附近，DNS 计算 **δ_st/δ_ν** 随 **Ra_r** 增大而上升。原文写道：*"It is observed that the ratio δ_st / δ_ν increases with Ra_r, following a power-law relation, i.e., δ_st / δ_ν = 0.0021Fr^{-1 / 6}Ra_r^{0.26}."* 指数 **0.26** 接近理论预测 **1/4**：*"The scaling exponent of 0.26 is close to the theoretical prediction δ_st / δ_ν ∼ Ra^{1 / 4}."*

### **Experimental transition points correspond to δ_st/δ_ν ≈ 0.78**

将实验得到的各 **Fr** 下临界 **Ra_r\*** 代入 DNS 拟合关系，得到临界厚度比均值 **0.78**，接近 **1**。原文写道：*"Substituting the experimentally determined critical value Ra_r^* at different Fr values into the fitted relation yields critical ratios with a mean of 0.78, which is close to 1."* 这为“厚度相当触发转捩”的尺度假设提供了量化支持。

### **Scaling collapse confirms universal dependence on Fr^{-1/6}Ra_r^{1/4}**

图 3 插图中，**δ_st/δ_ν** 对 **Fr^{-1/6}Ra_r^{1/4}** 作图后，数据塌缩到单一直线。原文写道：*"The inset of Fig. 3 further presents δ_st / δ_ν as a function of Fr^{-1 / 6}Ra_r^{1 / 4}, where all data points collapse onto a single line, clearly demonstrating the universal character of this scaling relationship."* 这说明控制变量确实是 Stewartson 层与黏性边界层的相对厚度，而非单独的 **Ra_r** 或 **Fr**。

### **Boundary-layer interaction supports the ultimate-state trigger mechanism**

DNS 与理论共同支持耦合边界层扰动机制。原文总结为：*"This supports our theoretical explanation: a coupled flow structure, arising from the interaction of the Stewartson and viscous boundary layers, introduces distortions to the boundary layer flow, which in turn promotes flow instability and triggers the transition to turbulence."* 该机制把低阈值终极态与残余地球重力直接联系起来。

---

## Conclusion and outlook

### **Heat-transport exponent increases from 0.27 to 0.46 across Fr range**

最终结果显示，在宽 **Fr** 范围内，传热标度指数从经典态 **γ = 0.27** 增大到终极态 **γ = 0.46**。原文写道：*"Across a wide range of Froude numbers, the heat transport exponent increases from γ = 0.27 to γ = 0.46, marking the transition from the classical regime to the ultimate regime."* 这一指数变化符合终极态判据 **γ > 1/3**。

### **Lower Fr lowers the ultimate-state onset threshold**

临界 **Ra_r\*** 随 **Fr** 降低而降低，说明地球重力影响转捩。原文写道：*"The corresponding critical Rayleigh number for the onset of the ultimate regime is found to decrease with decreasing Froude number, highlighting the effect of Earth's gravity on the transition."* 这与理论关系 **Ra_r\* ∼ Fr^{2/3}** 一致。

### **Classical regime is controlled by the viscous boundary layer because Stewartson layer is thinner**

在经典态，地球重力诱导的 Stewartson 层比黏性边界层薄，因此边界层稳定性主要由黏性边界层控制。原文表述为：*"In the classical regime, the Stewartson layer induced by Earth's gravity is thinner than the viscous boundary layer, so the latter controls boundary-layer stability."* 这解释了低 **Ra_r** 下为何仍保持经典态传热。

### **Ultimate regime begins when δ_st/δ_ν approaches unity**

当 **Ra_r** 达到临界值后，Stewartson 层厚度与黏性边界层相当，临界比值约 **δ_st/δ_ν ≈ 0.78**。原文写道：*"Once Ra_r reaches the critical Rayleigh number, i.e., in the ultimate regime, the Stewartson layer becomes comparable to the viscous boundary layer (δ_st / δ_ν ≈ 0.78), and boundary-layer stability is then governed by their interaction."* 这给出了终极态提前发生的定量阈值。

### **Strong coupling enhances anisotropy and triggers laminar-to-turbulent transition**

在终极态起点，壁面附近速度分量强耦合，产生耦合流，扭曲黏性边界层并增强局部速度变化各向异性。原文写道：*"the velocity components are strongly coupled near the walls, potentially giving rise to a coupled flow that distorts the viscous boundary layer and enhances the anisotropy of local velocity variations, thereby triggering flow instability and causing the laminar layer to transition to turbulence."* 该机制将边界层失稳与传热增强直接相连。

### **Turbulent boundary layers disturb thermal boundary layers and increase heat transport**

层流边界层转为湍流后，热边界层受到持续扰动，导致传热显著增强。原文写道：*"The turbulent boundary layer continuously disturbs the thermal boundary layer, characterized by a significant increase in heat transport."* 这解释了 **Nu** 标度指数为何从 **0.27** 提高到 **0.46**。

### **Current support relies on extrapolated low-Ra DNS**

机制解释受到 DNS 支持，但 DNS 发生在较低 **Ra_r**，因此属于外推支持而非转捩条件下的直接解析。原文明确写道：*"This interpretation is supported by extrapolated results from direct numerical simulations at relatively low Ra_r."* 这是结论中最重要的谨慎限定。

### **Direct high-Ra boundary-layer measurement remains the key future challenge**

未来需要在转捩条件下直接测量和建模两类边界层相互作用。原文写道：*"Future work will need to directly measure and theoretically model the interaction of the boundary layers through experiments and simulations at the onset conditions, thereby providing direct evidence for this interpretation."* 实验挑战是高 **Ra** 下解析极薄边界层，数值挑战是达到足够高 **Ra_r** 并保持三维重力效应：*"the challenge for experiments is resolving the boundary layers at such high Rayleigh numbers, while for numerical simulations, it is reaching such high Ra_r, particularly in three-dimensional simulations to capture the additional effects of gravity."*

---

## End Matter

## Governing equations

### **The model uses Oberbeck-Boussinesq equations in a rotating reference frame**

控制方程基于**Oberbeck-Boussinesq 假设**，在旋转参考系中写出无量纲形式。原文写道：*"Dimensionless governing equations following the Oberbeck-Boussinesq assumption in a rotating reference frame can be expressed as..."* 方程包括不可压缩条件 **∇·u = 0**、温度输运方程和动量方程。温度方程为：*"∂T/∂t + ∇ · (uT) = 1/√(Ra_r Pr) ∇²T."*

### **Momentum equation includes Coriolis force, viscosity, centrifugal buoyancy, and gravity buoyancy**

动量方程包含压力梯度、Coriolis 项、黏性扩散、径向离心浮力和轴向重力浮力。原文动量方程中出现：*"- Ro^{-1} ê_z × u"*、*"√(Pr/Ra_r) ∇²u"*、*"- [2(1 - η)/(1 + η)] r T ê_r"* 以及 *"+ (Ra_g/Ra_r) T ê_z."* 这四项分别对应旋转效应、黏性扩散、离心热浮力和地球重力热浮力。

### **Four primary dimensionless control parameters govern the system**

关键控制参数包括 **centrifugal Rayleigh number Ra_r**、**gravitational Rayleigh number Ra_g**、**inverse Rossby number Ro^{-1}** 和 **Prandtl number Pr**。原文写道：*"there are four key control dimensionless parameters, namely the centrifugal Rayleigh number Ra_r, gravitational Rayleigh number Ra_g, inverse Rossby number Ro^{-1}, and Prandtl number Pr."* 定义为：

- **Ra_r = αΩ²R_mΔTL³/(νκ)**
- **Ra_g = αgΔTL³/(νκ)**
- **Ro^{-1} = 2[αΔTR_m/L]^{-1/2}**
- **Pr = ν/κ**

### **Nusselt number is defined from total heat flux relative to conductive heat flux**

响应参数 **Nu** 度量系统实际热通量相对于纯导热热通量的比例。原文定义为：*"One of the response dimensionless parameters is the Nusselt number Nu, which quantifies the ratio between the heat flux transported by the system J_total and that by conduction J_conduction."* 公式为 **Nu = Q ln(R_o/R_i)/(λΔT2πH)**，其中 **Q** 是外圆柱输入功率，**λ** 是热导率，**H** 是外圆柱高度。

### **AFiD-based numerical solver is extended to include CC physics**

数值代码基于开源 **AFiD** 扩展。原文写道：*"The code utilized in this Letter is an extended development based on the open-source program AFiD [42-44], which was originally designed for the classical RBC systems."* 在 CC 系统中加入 **Coriolis force**、**gravity** 和 **centrifugal buoyancy**：*"In the CC system, we have incorporated the effects of the Coriolis force, gravity, and centrifugal buoyancy."*

### **Boundary conditions match the annular rotating convection geometry**

内外圆柱面采用**无滑移 no-slip** 和**等温 isothermal**边界条件；上下端盖采用**无滑移**和**绝热 adiabatic**条件。原文写道：*"No-slip and isothermal boundary conditions are imposed on the inner and outer cylindrical surfaces, while no-slip and adiabatic boundary conditions are applied to the top and bottom end covers."*

### **Numerical discretization and statistics are specified quantitatively**

网格为交错网格，空间导数采用二阶中心差分，时间推进结合三阶分步 Runge-Kutta 与 Crank-Nicholson 隐式项。原文写道：*"Grid generation employs a staggered grid scheme, with spatial derivatives solved via the second-order central difference method, and temporal derivatives processed by combining the third-order fractional-step Runge-Kutta method with Crank-Nicholson implicit terms."* 显式时间推进满足 **CFL ≤ 0.8**：*"the Courant-Friedrichs-Lewy number is restricted to within 0.8."* 流场通常在超过 **150** 个无量纲时间单位后达到统计稳态，随后再模拟 **350** 个无量纲时间单位采样：*"the flow field reaches a statistically steady state after over 150 dimensionless time units... following which an additional 350 dimensionless time units... are conducted to collect data."*

### **Quarter-circumference simulations reduce cost without losing key flow structures**

由于 CC 流场在周向具有周期性，模拟域可缩小到半周甚至四分之一周。原文写道：*"Previous studies have confirmed that the flow field in the CC system exhibits periodic characteristics in the circumferential direction."* 只要计算域包含至少一对对流涡，传热和流动结构可与全周模拟相当：*"As long as the computational domain contains at least one pair of convective vortices, the heat transport and flow structures will be comparable to those from full-circumference simulations."* 因此多数模拟采用 **1/4 circumference**：*"we adopt 1/4 of the circumference as the computational domain."*

---

## Working fluid (Silicone oil-1cs)

### **Silicone oil-1cs offers a wider Ra_r window around the transition**

选择 **Silicone oil-1cs** 的优势是，在相同温差范围内，它比水和 Novec-7200 更能覆盖经典态到终极态临界 **Ra_r\*** 附近的宽 **Ra_r** 区间。原文写道：*"The advantage of using Silicone oil-1cs... is that, for the same range of temperature difference ΔT, it can cover a wider range of Ra_r around the critical Ra_r^* from the classical to the ultimate regime than water... or Novec-7200."* 其中水为 **Pr = 4.3 at 40°C**，Novec-7200 为 **Pr = 10.3 at 25°C**，Silicone oil-1cs 为 **Pr = 16.4 at 25°C**。

### **Physical properties are fixed at 25°C**

表 I 给出 **Silicone oil-1cs** 在 **25°C** 下的物性。原文写道：*"Table I lists the physical properties of Silicone oil-1cs at 25°C."* 具体为：**thermal expansion α = 1.29×10⁻³ K⁻¹**，**kinematic viscosity ν = 1.00×10⁻⁶ m²s⁻¹**，**thermal diffusivity κ = 6.11×10⁻⁸ m²s⁻¹**，**thermal conductivity λ = 0.10 W(mK)⁻¹**，**Prandtl number Pr = 16.4**。

---

## Parameter space

### **Sixty experiments cover the transition range in Fr–Ra_r and Pr–Ra_r planes**

参数空间在 **Fr–Ra_r** 和 **Pr–Ra_r** 平面中展示，总实验数为 **60**。原文写道：*"The parameter space explored in the Fr - Ra_r and Pr - Ra_r planes is shown in Figs. 4(a) and 4(b), respectively. A total of 60 experiments were performed."*

### **Temperature difference and Oberbeck-Boussinesq validity are controlled**

实验温差范围为 **ΔT = 2.77–21.35 K**，并满足 **Oberbeck-Boussinesq conditions**。原文写道：*"The temperature difference ΔT ranged from 2.77 to 21.35 K, and the Oberbeck-Boussinesq conditions are well satisfied."* 这意味着物性随温度变化的非 Boussinesq 效应受控，不主导观测到的转捩。

### **Experimental Ra_r and effective gravity ranges are broad**

实验 **Ra_r** 覆盖 **1.76×10⁹–3.04×10¹¹**，转速为 **94–528 rpm**，对应等效重力 **1.78g–56.2g**。原文写道：*"The Rayleigh number Ra_r spans 1.76×10^9 to 3.04×10^{11}, and the rotation rate ranges from 94 to 528 rpm, corresponding to an effective gravity of 1.78g to 56.2g."* 这一范围足以覆盖多个 **Fr** 下的经典态—终极态转捩。

---

## 第四部分：深度理解与语言支持

### 1. 术语解析

#### **Ultimate regime**

**Ultimate regime** 指热对流湍流中边界层也进入湍流状态的极限传热区间。经典态中体区可以湍流化，但边界层仍常保持层流型，因此 **Nu–Ra** 指数通常低于 **1/3**；终极态中边界层转为湍流，理论上有效指数超过 **1/3** 并趋近 **1/2**。文中的判断依据是 **Nu ∼ Ra_r^0.27** 转为 **Nu ∼ Ra_r^0.46**。

#### **Classical regime**

**Classical regime** 不是指流动完全层流，而是指热对流整体可能已湍流，但控制传热的边界层仍是层流型或类层流型。文中低 **Ra_r** 区域的 **γ = 0.27 < 1/3** 被归为经典态，核心原因是边界层尚未发生湍流化转捩。

#### **Stewartson layer**

**Stewartson layer** 是旋转流体中因边界、剪切或几何约束产生的侧壁型边界层，通常与 Coriolis 约束和旋转效应有关。文中该层不是由离心浮力本身直接产生，而是由**残余地球重力**破坏上下对称性后，在冷热圆柱壁附近诱导的轴向涡结构形成。厚度标度为 **δ_st/L ∼ Ek^{1/3}**。

#### **Non-normal-nonlinear mechanism**

**Non-normal-nonlinear mechanism** 指边界层或剪切流中，即使线性模态不具有传统指数增长，不同扰动模式也可因非正规算子产生瞬态放大，再通过非线性相互作用触发湍流。文中用它解释转捩对残余重力扰动敏感：地球重力诱导的 Stewartson 层不是简单改变平均传热，而是为边界层失稳提供有限幅值扰动通道。

#### **Compensated plot**

**Compensated plot** 是将 **Nu** 除以某个参考幂律如 **Ra^{1/3}** 后作图，用于放大标度指数相对于参考值的偏离。若 **Nu/Ra^{1/3}** 随 **Ra** 下降，表示 **γ < 1/3**；若上升，表示 **γ > 1/3**。文中用该方法确定经典态到终极态的转折点。

---

### 2. 疑难查证

#### **为什么 Fr 越小，终极态越早出现？**

**Fr = Ω²R_m/g** 表示离心加速度相对于地球重力的强度。直觉上，离心力越强似乎越容易进入强湍流；但文中的转捩不是由体区湍流强度单独决定，而是由**边界层失稳**决定。

在固定装置和流体条件下：

\[
Ek = \frac{\nu}{\Omega H^2}, \quad Fr = \frac{\Omega^2R_m}{g}
\]

因此：

\[
Ek \sim Fr^{-1/2}
\]

Stewartson 层厚度：

\[
\delta_{st}/L \sim Ek^{1/3} \sim Fr^{-1/6}
\]

**Fr 越小，δ_st 越厚**。而黏性边界层：

\[
\delta_\nu/L \sim Ra^{-1/4}
\]

随着 **Ra** 增大而变薄。转捩条件为：

\[
\delta_{st} \sim \delta_\nu
\]

如果 **Fr** 较小，Stewartson 层本来就更厚，所以不需要把 **Ra** 提得很高就能与黏性边界层厚度相当。因此 **Ra_r\*** 更低。

---

#### **为什么 δ_st/δ_ν ≈ 0.78 而不是严格 1 也能支持机制？**

边界层“厚度相当”不是数学上必须完全相等，而是流体动力学中的尺度匹配条件。实际边界层厚度定义依赖速度剖面、阈值选取、空间位置、统计平均方法和数值分辨率。DNS 拟合关系给出的临界均值 **0.78** 接近 **O(1)**，说明 Stewartson 层与黏性边界层已经进入同一空间尺度范围，足以发生强耦合。对于湍流转捩问题，**O(1) 的厚度比**比精确等于 1 更具有物理意义。

---

#### **为什么终极态不是由 Stewartson 层本身直接等同于湍流边界层？**

Stewartson 层是残余重力与旋转效应诱导的侧壁流动结构；终极态要求控制传热的边界层进入湍流型状态。二者不是同一概念。文中的机制是：

1. 地球重力诱导 **Stewartson layer**；
2. **Ra** 增大使 **viscous boundary layer** 变薄；
3. 两者厚度相当时发生速度分量强耦合；
4. 耦合流扭曲黏性边界层；
5. 黏性边界层由层流型转为湍流型；
6. 湍流边界层扰动热边界层；
7. **Nu** 显著提高，表现为终极态标度。

Stewartson 层是触发器，不是终极态本身。

---

## 第五部分：创新评估与关联

### 1. 创新性判断

#### **从“观察到终极态”推进到“解释为何提前出现”**

过去 2–5 年中，离心对流研究的重要进展包括 Jiang 等在 2020 年建立超重力离心热对流实验平台、2022 年给出终极态存在证据，以及 Yao 等 2025 年通过 DNS 研究从重力主导到离心主导的流动结构演化。已有工作确认 CC 能达到高 **Ra**，并显示终极态可在 **O(10¹⁰)** 出现，但缺少对转捩阈值为何远低于经典 RBC 的机制解释。

该研究的新颖性在于把提前转捩归因于**残余地球重力诱导的 Stewartson 层与黏性边界层相互作用**，而非笼统归因于离心加速度增强或实验可达更高 **Ra**。

#### **建立了可检验的临界标度 Ra_r\* ∼ Fr^{2/3}**

最重要的理论创新是从边界层厚度标度推出：

\[
\delta_{st}/L \sim Fr^{-1/6}, \quad \delta_\nu/L \sim Ra^{-1/4}
\]

令二者相当得到：

\[
Ra_r^* \sim Fr^{2/3}
\]

这一关系被实验数据验证。相比只报告 **Nu–Ra** 指数变化，这一幂律直接提供了可预测、可检验的转捩阈值模型。

#### **把地球重力从“残余误差”转化为“关键物理机制”**

在超重力离心系统中，地球重力常被视为相对离心力的小扰动，因为离心加速度可达数十倍 **g**。该研究显示，即使地球重力垂直于主要温度梯度，仍可通过诱导 Stewartson 层改变边界层稳定性，并显著降低终极态转捩阈值。这一视角改变了对“残余重力”的理解：它不是可忽略背景项，而是决定转捩阈值的核心控制因素。

#### **连接了 CC、RRBC 与经典 RBC 的边界层转捩图景**

经典 RBC 终极态转捩长期与边界层从 Prandtl-Blasius 型到 Prandtl-von Kármán 型的变化相关，但直接机制难以验证。RRBC 中已有边界层厚度竞争控制流态转变的认识。该研究将类似思想移植到 CC 中，但提出新的配对：**Stewartson layer vs viscous boundary layer**。因此，它为不同热对流系统中的转捩提供了统一思路：宏观传热态改变可由不同边界层厚度匹配和相互作用触发。

#### **实验与 DNS 的互补性构成强证据链，但仍非最终证明**

创新证据链包括：

- **60 组实验**；
- **Fr = 1.78–56.2**；
- **Ra_r = 1.76×10⁹–3.04×10¹¹**；
- 经典态 **γ = 0.27**；
- 终极态 **γ = 0.46**；
- 临界标度 **Ra_r\* ∼ Fr^{2/3}**；
- DNS 拟合 **δ_st/δ_ν = 0.0021Fr^{-1/6}Ra_r^{0.26}**；
- 临界厚度比均值 **δ_st/δ_ν ≈ 0.78**。

局限在于 DNS 只覆盖 **Ra_r = 10⁶–4.64×10⁸**，低于实验临界区间，因此边界层耦合仍需在真实转捩 **Ra_r** 下直接验证。尽管如此，理论标度、实验临界幂律和 DNS 厚度比塌缩三者一致，使该机制具有较高可信度。

items.title_en: Quantum Mpemba Effect Induced by Non-Markovian Exceptional Points

poster_elements.研究问题: 在真实量子器件常见的强耦合、结构化热浴中，系统具有记忆效应，传统 Born-Markov 近似和普通 Lindblad 主方程失效；论文要解决的核心问题是：非马尔可夫开放量子系统中，是否存在一种由“非马尔可夫例外点”触发的量子 Mpemba 效应，使一个离平衡更远的量子态反而比更接近平衡的量子态更快弛豫。
poster_elements.创新方法: Aha 点是把复杂的非马尔可夫记忆核转化为可画成“系统 + 辅助伪模”的扩展 Lindblad 动力学：将热浴相关函数分解为指数和，每一项对应一个会储存并回流能量/信息的伪模；在扩展 Liouvillian 超算符中寻找谱奇异性，即非马尔可夫 Liouvillian 例外点。例外点处慢衰减模与快衰减模合并，Liouvillian 谱隙最大化，从而像打开一条快速弛豫通道，诱导远离平衡态加速追上稳态。
poster_elements.工作流程: 输入为开放量子系统、耗散算符、结构化玻色热浴谱密度与初始量子态；先由谱密度得到热浴相关函数，并拟合成多个指数衰减项；再把每个指数项映射成一个带频率、阻尼和耦合强度的辅助伪模，构建系统-伪模哈密顿量和扩展 Liouvillian；随后对扩展 Liouvillian 做谱分析，寻找本征值和本征矩阵合并的非马尔可夫例外点；最后让两个不同初态演化，一个远离平衡但调到例外点，一个更接近平衡但避开例外点，通过迹距离随时间的交叉来判定量子 Mpemba 效应。
poster_elements.关键结果: 在可精确求解的耗散量子谐振子模型中，论文解析给出扩展 Liouvillian 本征值和弛豫轨迹；当单伪模情形满足 γ=4α 且系统频率 ω0=Ω 时出现非马尔可夫例外点，谱隙 Δ 达到最大，迹距离衰减最快。数值与解析结果显示：初始相干态幅度更大的远离平衡态，在例外点驱动下，其到稳态的距离曲线会穿过并低于更接近平衡态的曲线，明确出现量子 Mpemba 效应；而在 Born-Markov 极限下谱隙恒定、无例外点，也观察不到这种加速优势。
poster_elements.应用价值: 该研究为非平衡量子系统提供一种可调控的快速弛豫机制：利用环境记忆与伪模自由度制造谱奇异点，加速能量和信息向稳态转移。它可用于提升量子电池放电效率、优化量子热机循环、设计更快的量子态制备与冷却方案，并可在核磁共振量子模拟、囚禁离子和超导电路 QED 平台中通过系统-伪模结构进行实验验证。

items.deep_analysis:
## 第一部分：核心概览 (Overview)

非马尔可夫开放量子系统中的 **Mpemba 加速弛豫** 被归因于 **扩展 Liouvillian 的非马尔可夫例外点**。通过 **pseudomode master equation / Markovian embedding**，原本含记忆核的非马尔可夫动力学被嵌入高维 Lindblad 演化，使谱分析重新可用。耗散量子谐振子给出精确可解验证：在 $\gamma=4\alpha,\ \omega_0=\Omega$ 时出现 LEP，谱隙最大，远离平衡态反而更快接近平衡。相较传统 Born-Markovian LEP 机制，该工作把 QMPE 的谱奇异性机制推广到强耦合、结构化浴和实验可及的非马尔可夫区域。

---

## 第二部分：结构化快速回顾

《Quantum Mpemba Effect Induced by Non-Markovian Exceptional Points》（Ze-Zhou Zhang, Hong-Gang Luo, and Wei Wu，2026）

### 背景

**量子 Mpemba 效应（QMPE）** 指远离平衡的量子态比更接近平衡的量子态更快弛豫。既有解释多依赖 **Born-Markovian approximation** 与 **Lindblad master equation**，其中弛豫由 **Liouvillian spectral gap** 控制，**Liouvillian exceptional point（LEP）** 可诱导加速弛豫。但强耦合或结构化环境中，浴记忆效应使传统 Lindblad 与 Markovian LEP 概念失效。

### 方法

采用 **pseudomode master equation approach / Markovian embedding technique**：当浴关联函数可写成有限指数和  
\[
C(t)=\sum_{i=1}^{N}\alpha_i^2 e^{-i\Omega_i t-\gamma_i t/2},
\]
非马尔可夫系统动力学等价于系统加辅助 pseudomodes 的高维 Lindblad 演化。对扩展 Liouvillian $\hat{\mathcal L}$ 进行谱分析，定义并利用 **non-Markovian LEPs**。

### 结果

耗散量子谐振子模型 $\hat H_s=\omega_0\hat a_0^\dagger\hat a_0,\ \hat S=\hat a_0$ 可精确求解。$N=1$ 时，特征根为  
\[
\tilde\lambda_{0,1}=-\gamma/4\pm\kappa-\frac{i}{2}(\omega_0+\Omega),
\]
其中  
\[
\kappa=\sqrt{[\gamma+2i(\Omega-\omega_0)]^2/16-\alpha^2}.
\]
当 $\gamma=4\alpha$ 且 $\omega_0=\Omega$，$\lambda_1=\lambda_2$，发生 LEP，谱隙  
\[
\Delta=\gamma/4-\mathrm{Re}(\kappa)
\]
达到最大，导致更快弛豫。图 3 中 $\xi=2,\omega_0=\Omega$ 的远离平衡态曲线与 $\xi=0.4,\omega_0=1.2\Omega$ 的近平衡态曲线出现交叉，显示 QMPE。

### 讨论

非马尔可夫 LEP 产生的加速不可由 Born-Markovian 近似预测。Markovian 极限给出标准 Lindblad 方程，谱隙固定为  
\[
\Delta_M=\gamma_M/2,
\]
无 LEP，因而在相同设置下不出现 QMPE。pseudomode 可调性降低 LEP 实现条件，并可服务于量子电池放电加速。

### 局限

浴关联函数需能表示或拟合为有限指数和；当 pseudomode 数 $N$ 很大时，求解扩展 Lindblad 方程的数值成本升高。该方法主要适用于 **Gaussian open systems**；对 **non-Gaussian bath models**，多时浴关联函数需单独处理，可行性仍未确定。

### 结论

辅助 pseudomodes 将非马尔可夫记忆转化为扩展 Liouvillian 谱结构，额外产生的非马尔可夫 LEPs 能诱导 QMPE。该机制适用于谐振子与离散变量系统，具备 NMR、超导电路等实验实现路径，并可能优化量子能量器件性能。

---

# 第三部分：逐章节冷凝解析 (Section-by-Section Condensing)

## Introduction

### **Quantum Mpemba effect as anomalous accelerated relaxation**

**QMPE** 被定义为远离平衡态比接近平衡态更快到达平衡的反常弛豫现象。经典 Mpemba 效应源于“热水比冷水更快结冰”的反直觉现象，量子推广把对象从宏观热过程转向微观开放量子系统。关键定义为：*"The QMPE refers to an anomalous phenomenon where a farfrom-equilibrium state relaxes to equilibrium more quickly than a state closer to equilibrium."* 该现象的基础意义在于理解 **thermalization**，应用意义包括提升 **quantum battery** 放电效率和优化 **quantum heat engines**。

### **Markovian explanations rely on Lindblad spectral structure**

既有开放量子系统解释大量依赖 **Born-Markovian approximation**，将约化动力学写成 **Lindblad master equation**。在该框架下，弛豫时间尺度由 **Liouvillian operator** 的最慢本征模决定：*"This Lindbladian evolution shows that the relaxation timescale is determined by the slowest eigenmode of the Liouvillian operator."* 因此，当两个或多个 Liouvillian 本征值简并且本征矩阵合并时，**Liouvillian exceptional point（LEP）** 可触发 QMPE：*"the occurrence of Liouvillian exceptional point (LEP), where two or more eigenenergies become degenerate and the corresponding eigenvectors coalesce, is able to induce the QMPE."*

### **Born-Markovian LEP mechanism fails in strong-coupling or structured-bath regimes**

传统 LEP-QMPE 机制主要限于 **Born-Markov approximation**。该近似只在弱耦合或浴谱平坦时可靠：*"which is only valid in the weak-coupling regime or when the bath energy spectrum is flat."* 当系统-环境耦合增强时，**non-Markovianity** 通过时间非局域运动方程中的 **memory kernel** 表征，并使传统 Lindblad 方程和 LEP 概念失效：*"the non-Markovianity, which is commonly encoded in the memory kernel of a time-nonlocal equation of motion, invalidates the traditional Lindblad master equation as well as the concept of LEP."*

### **Non-Markovianity is experimentally relevant rather than merely formal**

非马尔可夫性不仅是理论推广，而是实验量子器件中的必要现实。超导电路平台已经清楚展示非马尔可夫动力学：*"Recent advances in the superconducting circuit platform have clearly demonstrated non-Markovian dynamics, making the non-Markovianity essential in real quantum devices."* 这使得强耦合、结构化浴、长记忆时间环境中的 QMPE 机制具有直接实验意义。

### **Existing non-Markovian QMPE studies do not settle the LEP connection**

已有少数 **non-Markovian QMPE** 研究通常采用 **time-convolutionless master equation** 与时间依赖 Liouvillian：*"these studies typically employed the time-convolutionless master equation with a time-dependent Liouvillian operator."* 但该路线存在两点不足：第一，time-convolutionless 不是唯一非马尔可夫方法；第二，时间依赖 Liouvillian 使传统谱分析难以用于识别 LEP。核心缺口被表述为：*"A gap still remains in understanding the relationship between LEPs and the non-Markovian QMPE."*

### **Pseudomode embedding generalizes LEP to non-Markovian dynamics**

通过 **pseudomode master equation approach**，非马尔可夫效应被引入辅助 pseudomodes，使原系统动力学等价于系统-pseudomode 的 Lindblad 演化：*"This approach incorporates the non-Markovian effect through introducing auxiliary pseudomodes."* 该思路类似 **hierarchical equations of motion** 中用辅助密度算符编码记忆效应。嵌入后，非马尔可夫动力学可重新使用 Liouvillian 谱分析：*"the original non-Markovian dynamics becomes dynamically equivalent to a system-pseudomode Lindbladian evolution."*

### **Main conceptual contribution**

核心机制是利用 **non-Markovian LEPs** 诱导 QMPE，这类 LEP 无法在 Born-Markovian 近似中获得：*"we uncover a notable QMPE induced by non-Markovian LEPs, which are inaccessible under the Born-Markovian approximation."* 理论框架同时覆盖 Markovian 与 non-Markovian 动力学，建立 LEP 与 QMPE 的统一关联：*"establishes a unified framework that bridges the connection between the LEPs and the QMPE within both Markovian and non-Markovian dynamics."*

---

## Non-Markovian dynamics

### **General open-system Hamiltonian with linear bosonic bath coupling**

开放量子系统由系统哈密顿量、玻色浴和线性交互构成：
\[
\hat H_{\mathrm{tot}}
=
\hat H_s+\hat H_b+\hat S\hat B^\dagger+\hat S^\dagger\hat B.
\]
其中 $\hat H_b=\sum_k\omega_k\hat b_k^\dagger\hat b_k$，$\hat B=\sum_k g_k\hat b_k$。耦合强度的频率分布由谱密度编码：
\[
J(\omega)=\sum_k |g_k|^2\delta(\omega-\omega_k).
\]
形式的普适性被明确强调：*"The explicit expressions of $\hat{H}_{\mathrm{s}}$, $\hat{S}$, and $J(\omega)$ are not addressed here, because our formula is universal to their forms."*

### **Factorized vacuum initial condition and reduced dynamics**

总初态假设为系统与浴直积分：
\[
\rho_{\mathrm{tot}}(0)=\rho_s(0)\otimes\rho_b(0),
\]
其中浴处于真空：
\[
\rho_b(0)=\bigotimes_k |0_k\rangle\langle 0_k|.
\]
系统约化态由全局幺正演化后对浴求迹得到：
\[
\rho_s(t)=\mathrm{Tr}_b[
e^{-it\hat H_{\mathrm{tot}}}\rho_s(0)\otimes\rho_b(0)e^{it\hat H_{\mathrm{tot}}}
].
\]
关键点是玻色浴的 **Gaussianity** 使两时关联函数足以决定约化动力学：*"One finds that $\rho_{\mathrm{s}}(t)$ is completely determined by the two-time bath correlation function $C(t)=\int_0^\infty d\omega J(\omega)e^{-i\omega t}$ due to the Gaussianity of the bosonic bath."*

### **Memory kernel prevents simple closed reduced dynamics**

即便只需两时关联函数，非马尔可夫动力学仍因时间非局域卷积项而难以简单表达：*"due to the time-nonlocal convolution terms, which collect the non-Markovian effect, $\rho_{\mathrm{s}}(t)$ still lacks a very simple expression."* 这里 **time-nonlocal convolution terms** 是浴记忆的数学载体，意味着系统当前变化依赖过去状态历史。

### **Finite exponential decomposition enables pseudomode embedding**

若浴关联函数能精确或近似写成有限指数和：
\[
C(t)=\sum_{i=1}^{N}\alpha_i^2 e^{-i\Omega_i t-\gamma_i t/2},
\]
则原系统约化态 $\rho_s(t)$ 动力学等价于扩展系统态 $\rho_{sp}(t)$ 对 pseudomodes 求迹：
\[
\varrho_s(t)=\mathrm{Tr}_p[\rho_{sp}(t)].
\]
该等价性是方法核心：*"if this bath correlation function can be (at least approximately) written as a finite sum of exponentials ... one proves that $\rho_{\mathrm{s}}(t)$ is dynamically equivalent to $\varrho_{\mathrm{s}}(t)=\mathrm{Tr}_{\mathrm{p}}[\rho_{\mathrm{sp}}(t)]$."*

### **Extended Lindblad equation for system plus pseudomodes**

扩展密度矩阵满足 Lindblad 型方程：
\[
\dot\rho_{sp}(t)=\hat{\mathcal L}\rho_{sp}(t)
=
-i[\hat H_{sp},\rho_{sp}(t)]
+
\sum_{i=1}^{N}\gamma_i\hat{\mathcal D}_{\hat a_i}[\rho_{sp}(t)].
\]
扩展哈密顿量为：
\[
\hat H_{sp}
=
\hat H_s+\sum_{i=1}^{N}\Omega_i\hat a_i^\dagger\hat a_i
+
\sum_{i=1}^{N}(\alpha_i\hat S\hat a_i^\dagger+\mathrm{H.c.}).
\]
$\hat a_i$ 是第 $i$ 个 pseudomode 的湮灭算符，频率为 $\Omega_i$，耗散率为 $\gamma_i$。初态为：
\[
\rho_{sp}(0)=\rho_s(0)\otimes\rho_p(0),\quad
\rho_p(0)=\bigotimes_i |0_i\rangle\langle 0_i|.
\]
该结构说明非马尔可夫浴被替换为若干会衰减的辅助模。

### **Markovian embedding converts memory into auxiliary degrees of freedom**

该方法又称 **Markovian embedding technique**：*"which represents a non-Markovian evolution as a projection of a higher dimensional Markovian dynamics."* 物理图像是能量或信息先从系统流入 pseudomodes，再通过系统-pseudomode 相互作用部分回流：*"when the energy or the information flows from the system to the pseudomodes, it can be partially transferred back to the system via the system-pseudomodes interaction."* 因此，pseudomode 是环境记忆的显式自由度。

### **Extended Liouvillian permits conventional spectral analysis**

直接处理原始非马尔可夫方程通常比处理扩展 Lindblad 方程更困难；嵌入方法的计算和分析效率更高：*"Numerical or analytical treatments of Eq. (4) are typically more efficient than that of Eq. (2)."* 更重要的是，扩展 Liouvillian $\hat{\mathcal L}$ 可进行传统谱分析：*"this method allows us to perform conventional spectral analysis for the enlarged Liouvillian superoperator $\hat{\mathcal{L}}$."*

### **Non-Markovian LEPs differ from Markovian LEPs**

辅助 pseudomodes 引入额外谱结构，产生传统 Markovian 模型中不存在的 LEP：*"the introduction of auxiliary pseudomodes, can result in additional LEPs, which greatly modify the nonequilibrium dynamics of relaxation."* 因而 $\hat{\mathcal L}$ 的 LEP 被称为 **non-Markovian LEPs**，并且与传统 Markovian LEPs 本质不同：*"the LEPs of $\hat{\mathcal{L}}$ are called non-Markovian LEPs, which are fundamentally different from the Markovian LEPs."*

### **Applicability and limitations of exponential bath decomposition**

指数和条件并不严格，且在许多研究中常见：*"Eq. (3) is not a very stringent restriction and is widely needed in Refs. [70-72]."* 通过数值拟合技术，$C(t)$ 可方便写成该形式：*"Using certain numerical fitting techniques, $C(t)$ can be conveniently expressed as Eq. (3)."* 主要限制来自 $N$ 很大时求解扩展 Lindblad 方程的数值成本：*"The limitation of our employed method mainly comes from the numerical cost of solving Eq. (4) when $N$ is very large."*

### **Gaussian-bath restriction and open question for non-Gaussian baths**

方法通常用于 **Gaussian open systems**。对 **non-Gaussian bath models**，多时浴关联函数需要分别纳入：*"it is still an unknown question whether this method can be feasible in the non-Gaussian bath models, in which multitime bath correlation functions should be separately taken into account."* 这构成理论适用范围的明确边界。

---

## Non-Markovian LEPs and QMPE

### **Diagonalizable extended Liouvillian yields modal expansion**

若 $\hat{\mathcal L}$ 可对角化，其复本征值、右本征矩阵、左本征矩阵满足：
\[
\hat{\mathcal L}r_\ell=\lambda_\ell r_\ell,\quad
\hat{\mathcal L}^\dagger l_\ell=\lambda_\ell^*l_\ell.
\]
扩展密度矩阵可展开为：
\[
\rho_{sp}(t)=\sum_{\ell=0}^{M^2-1}
\mathrm{Tr}[l_\ell\rho_{sp}(0)]e^{\lambda_\ell t}r_\ell.
\]
其中 $M=\mathrm{Dim}(\hat H_{sp})$，$\lambda_0=0$，$r_0=\rho_{sp}^{eq}$。稳态满足：
\[
\hat{\mathcal L}\rho_{sp}^{eq}=0.
\]
这直接给出非平衡弛豫的谱分解形式。

### **Liouvillian spectral gap controls long-time relaxation**

非零本征值实部为负并表示接近稳态的弛豫率：*"Re$(\lambda_{\ell})$ are known to be negative and represent the relaxation rates toward the long-time steady state."* 按 $|\mathrm{Re}(\lambda_\ell)|$ 升序排列后，长时间动力学由最慢模控制：
\[
\rho_{sp}(t)\propto e^{-\Delta t}r_1,\quad
\Delta=-\mathrm{Re}(\lambda_1).
\]
$\Delta$ 即 **Liouvillian spectral gap**。

### **Trace distance decay inherits the extended spectral gap**

系统约化态与稳态的 trace distance 在长时间区间满足：
\[
\|\varrho_s(t)-\varrho_s^{eq}\|_{TD}\propto e^{-\Delta t}.
\]
trace norm 定义为：
\[
\|A\|_{TD}=\frac{1}{2}\mathrm{Tr}\sqrt{AA^\dagger}.
\]
核心关系是：*"Equation (7) means the Liouvillian spectral gap sets the timescale for the slowest relaxation to the steady state as $\tau_{\mathrm{R}}\sim 1/\Delta$."* 因而增大 $\Delta$ 会压缩弛豫时间：*"Via increasing the value of $\Delta$, the relaxation timescale can be accordingly compressed."*

### **LEP maximizes spectral gap and accelerates relaxation**

当最慢衰减模 $\{\lambda_1,r_1\}$ 与更快衰减模 $\{\lambda_2,r_2\}$ 在 LEP 处合并时，谱隙达到最大：*"When the slowest decay mode $\{\lambda_1,r_1\}$ coalesces with a faster decay mode $\{\lambda_2,r_2\}$ at the LEP, the Liouvillian spectral gap is maximized."* 物理后果是弛豫向稳态加速：*"which speeds up the relaxation toward the steady state."*

### **QMPE protocol uses different initial distances and different LEP conditions**

观测 QMPE 的方案选择两个初态 $\varrho_s^{(1)}(0)$ 和 $\varrho_s^{(2)}(0)$，其中第二个更接近平衡态：
\[
\|\varrho_s^{(2)}(0)-\varrho_s^{eq}\|_{TD}
<
\|\varrho_s^{(1)}(0)-\varrho_s^{eq}\|_{TD}.
\]
然后让较远初态在含 LEP 的 $\hat{\mathcal L}$ 下演化，让较近初态在无 LEP 的 $\hat{\mathcal L}$ 下演化。方案表述为：*"choosing two different initial states ... with $\varrho_{\mathrm{s}}^{(2)}(0)$ being closer to the long-time steady state ... designed to evolve under the guidances of $\hat{\mathcal{L}}$ with and without an LEP, respectively."*

### **QMPE diagnosis through trace-distance crossing**

若远离平衡态的 trace distance 曲线与近平衡态曲线交叉，说明远离平衡态在某时刻后更接近平衡，即出现 QMPE：*"Via observing the presence (or absence) of an intersection of the distances, one can determine the occurrence of QMPE."* 该效应来自扩展 Liouvillian 的谱奇异性，不能由 Born-Markovian 方法预测：*"Such a QMPE is generated by the spectral singularities of $\hat{\mathcal{L}}$, which can not be predicted by the Born-Markovian approach."*

### **Dissipative quantum harmonic oscillator enables exact benchmark**

为获得解析本征值与密度矩阵，采用耗散量子谐振子：
\[
\hat H_s=\omega_0\hat a_0^\dagger\hat a_0,\quad
\hat S=\hat a_0.
\]
该模型可通过 **Bogoliubov transformation** 和 **$\mathrm{su}(1,1)$ Lie algebra** 精确求解：*"the analytical expressions for $\lambda_{\ell}$ and $\rho_{\mathrm{sp}}(t)$ can be derived by using the Bogoliubov transformation and the $\mathrm{su}(1,1)$ Lie algebra."* 精确可解性使其成为检验非马尔可夫 LEP-QMPE 机制的基准：*"This model is exactly solvable, it can be employed as the benchmark to check the correctness of our proposed scheme."*

### **General eigenvalue formula for the oscillator**

扩展 Liouvillian 本征值为：
\[
\lambda_{mn}
=
\sum_{t=0}^{N}
\left[
i\,\mathrm{Im}(\tilde\lambda_t)(m_t-n_t)
+
\mathrm{Re}(\tilde\lambda_t)(m_t+n_t)
\right],
\]
其中 $m_t,n_t\in\mathbb N$。$\tilde\lambda_t$ 是特征多项式
\[
Q(\lambda)
=
(i\omega_0+\lambda)\prod_{i=1}^{N}
\left(i\Omega_i+\frac{\gamma_i}{2}+\lambda\right)
+
\sum_{i=1}^{N}\alpha_i^2
\prod_{i'\ne i}
\left(i\Omega_{i'}+\frac{\gamma_{i'}}{2}+\lambda\right)
\]
的根。该表达将 LEP 搜索转化为特征多项式根的简并与合并问题。

### **LEP can be tuned either by bath parameters or system frequency**

寻找 LEP 可固定系统频率并调节浴关联函数参数，也可固定浴参数 $\{\alpha_i,\gamma_i,\Omega_i\}$ 并改变 $\omega_0$：*"One can fix the frequency of the system, but adjust the parameters of the bath correlation function, or conversely, fix $\{\alpha_i,\gamma_i,\Omega_i\}$, but change $\omega_0$."* 第二种策略更接近原始 Mpemba 效应定义，因为“热”和“冷”系统处于同一环境：*"the second one is closer to the original definition of the Mpmba effect, in which the 'hotter' and 'colder' systems are placed in the same environment."*

### **Single-pseudomode case gives explicit LEP condition**

取 $N=1$，两个根为：
\[
\tilde\lambda_{0,1}
=
-\frac{\gamma}{4}
\pm\kappa
-
\frac{i}{2}(\omega_0+\Omega),
\]
其中
\[
\kappa=
\sqrt{
\frac{[\gamma+2i(\Omega-\omega_0)]^2}{16}
-\alpha^2
}.
\]
前三个本征值为：
\[
\lambda_0=0,
\]
\[
\lambda_1=-\frac{\gamma}{4}+\kappa-\frac{i}{2}(\omega_0+\Omega),
\]
\[
\lambda_2=-\frac{\gamma}{4}-\kappa-\frac{i}{2}(\omega_0+\Omega).
\]
谱隙为：
\[
\Delta=\frac{\gamma}{4}-\mathrm{Re}(\kappa).
\]

### **Exceptional point occurs at resonance and critical damping**

单 pseudomode 情形中 LEP 条件为：
\[
\gamma=4\alpha,\quad \omega_0=\Omega.
\]
此时：
\[
\lambda_1=\lambda_2=-\frac{\gamma}{4}-i\omega_0.
\]
该条件下谱隙达到最大：*"Clearly, a LEP occurs at $\gamma=4\alpha$ and $\omega_0=\Omega$ ... As displayed in Fig. 2, when the LEP occurs, $\Delta$ indeed reaches its maximum value."* 图 2 使用参数 $\Omega=1\mathrm{cm}^{-1}$、$\alpha/\Omega=1$，并比较 $\omega_0=0.6\Omega,\Omega,1.2\Omega$ 下的 $\ln D(t)$。

---

## Comparison with Born-Markovian results

### **Markovian limit emerges from vanishing bath memory**

$\gamma_i$ 与浴记忆时间相关。极限 $\gamma_i\to\infty$ 使浴关联函数快速消失，动力学变为 Markovian：*"As discussed in Refs. [49,80], $\gamma_i$ are related to the memory time of bath. If $\gamma_i\to\infty$, $C(t)$ vanishes and the dynamics becomes Markovian."* 再结合 Born 近似：
\[
\rho_{sp}(t)\approx \varrho_s(t)\otimes\rho_p(0),
\]
扩展 pseudomode 方程退化为标准 Lindblad 方程。

### **Born-Markovian reduction gives standard Lindblad equation**

Markovian 约化动力学为：
\[
\dot\varrho_s^M(t)
=
\hat{\mathcal L}_M\varrho_s^M(t)
=
-i[\hat H_s',\varrho_s^M(t)]
+
\gamma_M\hat{\mathcal D}_{\hat a_0}[\varrho_s^M(t)].
\]
修正系统哈密顿量为：
\[
\hat H_s'=\hat H_s+\hat H_{LS},
\]
Lamb shift 为：
\[
\hat H_{LS}
=
\sum_i\frac{4\alpha_i^2\Omega_i}{\gamma_i^2}
\hat a_0^\dagger\hat a_0,
\]
Markovian 衰减率为：
\[
\gamma_M=\sum_i\frac{4\alpha_i^2}{\gamma_i}.
\]
关键结论是：*"Eq. (4) naturally degrades to"* 标准 Lindblad 形式。

### **Markovian Liouvillian has no exceptional point in this oscillator model**

Markovian Liouvillian 本征值为：
\[
\lambda_{mn}^M
=
-\frac{1}{2}\gamma_M(m_0+n_0)
-
i\omega_0(m_0-n_0),
\quad m_0,n_0\in\mathbb N.
\]
谱隙固定为：
\[
\Delta_M=\frac{1}{2}\gamma_M.
\]
明确结论为：*"The above result implies there is no LEP and the spectral gap $\Delta_{\mathrm{M}}=\frac{1}{2}\gamma_{\mathrm{M}}$ remains constant in the Markovian case."* 因而 Markovian 谐振子无法通过 LEP 调大谱隙。

### **Non-Markovian LEP scheme works where Born-Markovian theory fails**

非马尔可夫方案的第一优势是可在 Born-Markovian 理论失效区域实现 LEP-QMPE：*"it enables the realization of an LEP-induced QMPE in regimes where the Born-Markovian theory fails."* 这包括强耦合、结构化谱密度和显著浴记忆的系统。补充材料还表明该机制可用于加速量子电池放电：*"the non-Markovian-LEP-induced QMPE can be used to accelerate the discharging of a quantum battery."*

### **Pseudomode tunability relaxes LEP conditions**

第二优势来自 pseudomodes 的额外可调性。相比 qubit 系统中的 Markovian LEP 条件，非马尔可夫 LEP 条件更宽松：*"thanks to the additional tunability of pseudomodes, our condition for forming LEPs is substantially relaxed compared with the Markovian LEP condition for qubit systems."* 该宽松条件使 trapped-ion 平台实验实现更可行：*"making it experimentally feasible using trapped-ion platforms."*

---

## Exemplification

### **Lorentzian spectral density naturally maps to one pseudomode**

验证模型为耗散量子谐振子，初态为实振幅 coherent state：
\[
\rho_s(0)=|\xi\rangle\langle\xi|,\quad \xi\in\mathbb R.
\]
谱密度取 Lorentzian：
\[
J(\omega)
=
\frac{1}{2\pi}
\frac{\Gamma\Lambda^2}{(\omega-\Omega)^2+\Lambda^2},
\]
其中 $\Gamma$ 是耦合强度，$\Lambda$ 是谱宽。浴关联函数为：
\[
C(t)=\frac{1}{2}\Gamma\Lambda e^{-(\Lambda+i\Omega)t}.
\]
该形式自然满足指数和条件：*"For such a Lorentzian spectral density, the bath correlation function reads $C(t)=\frac{1}{2}\Gamma\Lambda e^{-(\Lambda+i\Omega)t}$, which naturally satisfies Eq. (3)."*

### **Exact reduced state remains a coherent state with decaying amplitude**

求解扩展 Lindblad 方程并迹除 pseudomode 后，系统态为：
\[
\varrho_s(t)=|\xi P(t)\rangle\langle\xi P(t)|.
\]
其中
\[
P(t)=
e^{-i(\omega_0+\Omega)t/2-\gamma t/4}
\left\{
\cosh(\kappa t)
+
\frac{\gamma+2i(\Omega-\omega_0)}{4\kappa}
\sinh(\kappa t)
\right\}.
\]
该结果与 coherent-state path-integral 精确结果一致：*"This result is exactly the same with the rigorous result from the coherent-state path-integral method."*

### **Exact open-system dynamics is non-Markovian**

开放系统精确动力学本质上是非马尔可夫的：*"It is well known that an exact dynamics of an open quantum system is essentially non-Markovian."* 为说明这一点，使用 **Bures distance** 诊断由式 (11) 描述动力学的非马尔可夫性：*"the Bures distance is used to demonstrate the non-Markovianity of the dynamics described by Eq. (11)."*

### **Trace distance has closed analytical form**

稳态为真空型平衡态时，trace distance 为：
\[
D(t)
=
\|\varrho_s(t)-\varrho_s^{eq}\|_{TD}
=
\sqrt{1-e^{-|\xi P(t)|^2}}.
\]
这为判定 QMPE 提供直接可计算曲线。

### **QMPE setup uses two coherent states with different initial distances**

选择两个 coherent 初态：
\[
\varrho_s^{(1,2)}(0)=|\xi_{1,2}\rangle\langle\xi_{1,2}|,
\quad \xi_1>\xi_2.
\]
由于 $\xi_1>\xi_2$，$\varrho_s^{(2)}(0)$ 更接近稳态：*"with $\xi_1>\xi_2$ so that $\varrho_{\mathrm{s}}^{(2)}(0)$ is closer to the steady state."* 为保证同一环境，仅调节系统频率 $\omega_0$，固定 $\{\alpha,\gamma,\Omega\}$：*"we control $\omega_0$ with fixed $\{\alpha,\gamma,\Omega\}$ to guarantee the two states are under the same environmental conditions."*

### **Farther state evolves at the LEP while closer state evolves away from the LEP**

远离平衡的 $\varrho_s^{(1)}(t)$ 使用 $\omega_0=\Omega$，确保 LEP 出现；较近的 $\varrho_s^{(2)}(t)$ 使用无 LEP 的 Liouvillian：*"The evolution of $\varrho_{\mathrm{s}}^{(1)}(t)$ is governed by the $\hat{\mathcal{L}}$ with $\omega_0=\Omega$ which ensures the occurrence of LEPs; while $\varrho_{\mathrm{s}}^{(2)}(t)$ is determined by a $\hat{\mathcal{L}}$ without LEPs."* 图 3(c) 中参数为 $\xi=2,\omega_0=\Omega$ 与 $\xi=0.4,\omega_0=1.2\Omega$，并取 $\alpha=\Omega,\ \Omega=1\mathrm{cm}^{-1}$。

### **Trace-distance intersection confirms non-Markovian-LEP-induced QMPE**

图 3(c) 显示 trace distance 曲线出现交点：*"As displayed in Fig. 3(c), an intersection point is clearly observed, indicating a non-Markovian-LEP-induced QMPE."* 图 3(d) 中若远离平衡态也由无 LEP 的 $\hat{\mathcal L}$ 控制，则不出现交点：*"if $\varrho_{\mathrm{s}}^{(1)}(t)$ is also governed by a $\hat{\mathcal{L}}$ without LEPs, no QMPE occurs."* 图 3(d) 对应 $\xi=2,\omega_0=1.2\Omega$ 与 $\xi=0.4,\omega_0=0.8\Omega$。

### **Markovian comparison lacks LEP and lacks QMPE**

Markovian 情形的态为：
\[
\varrho_s^M(t)=|\xi P_M(t)\rangle\langle\xi P_M(t)|,
\]
\[
P_M(t)=e^{-\gamma_M t/2-i\omega_0t}.
\]
trace distance 为：
\[
\|\varrho_s^M(t)-\varrho_s^{eq}\|_{TD}
=
\sqrt{1-e^{-|\xi|^2e^{-\gamma_M t}}}.
\]
与非马尔可夫结果形成鲜明对比的是：*"In distinct contrast to the non-Markovian result, no LEP is found."* 因此由 $\hat{\mathcal L}$ 额外谱奇异性促成的加速优势是纯非马尔可夫效应：*"the acceleration advantage facilitated by the additional spectral singularities of $\hat{\mathcal{L}}$ is a purely non-Markovian effect."* Born-Markovian 处理中不观察到 QMPE：*"within the common Born-Markovian treatment, no QMPE is observed."*

---

## Discussion and conclusion

### **Experimental platforms include NMR and circuit QED**

理论预言可在 **nuclear magnetic resonance** 或 **circuit quantum electrodynamics** 架构中测试：*"Our theoretical predictions could be experimentally tested in the nuclear magnetic resonance platform or the circuit quantum electrodynamics architecture."* NMR 方案可用 iodotriuroethylene molecule 作为四量子比特量子模拟器：*"the system-pseudomode Hamiltonian $\hat{H}_{\mathrm{sp}}$ can be experimentally simulated by using the iodotriuroethylene molecule served as a four-qubit quantum simulator."*

### **NMR mapping uses one carbon nucleus as system and fluorine nuclei as pseudomode field**

在 NMR 映射中，$^{13}\mathrm C$ 核对应系统 qubit，三个 $^{19}\mathrm F$ 核映射为截断玻色场：*"The $^{13}\mathrm{C}$ nucleus corresponds to the system (a qubit), while the other three $^{19}\mathrm{F}$ nuclei are mapped to the truncated bosonic field of the pseudomode."* 虽然主文示例为谐振子，该实验描述强调离散变量实现路径。

### **Superconducting-circuit readout resonator can implement pseudomode**

在特定激发数限制下，超导电路中的 readout resonator 可模拟 pseudomode：*"for certain excitation-restriction situations, the pseudomode can be modeled by a readout resonator in a superconducting circuit."* 扩展 Liouvillian 可实验实现为 $9\times9$ 矩阵：*"where $\hat{\mathcal{L}}$ can be experimentally realized as a $9\times 9$ matrix."* 这与非马尔可夫量子例外点近期实验观测直接相关。

### **Auxiliary pseudomodes turn non-Markovian memory into extended Lindbladian dynamics**

总结机制为：*"by introducing auxiliary pseudomodes to incorporate the non-Markovian effect, the dissipative dynamics of an open quantum system can be equivalently described by a Lindbladian evolution with an extended Liouvillian superoperator."* 这使非马尔可夫动力学中的 LEP 可以像 Markovian Liouvillian 一样通过谱分析定位。

### **Non-Markovianity-induced additional LEPs enable experimentally friendly QMPE**

利用非马尔可夫性诱导的额外 LEPs，可提出实验友好的 QMPE 观测方案：*"Using these non-Markovianity-induced additional LEPs, we propose an experimentally friendly scheme to observe the QMPE."* 谐振子只是展示案例，该方案可推广到其他模型：*"Although only harmonic oscillator systems are displayed, our scheme can be generalized to other models, such as the discrete-variable system in Supplemental Material, without difficulties."*

### **No unitary rotation of initial state is required**

与 Ref. [4] 的 Markovian QMPE 方案不同，该机制不需要对初态施加 unitary rotations：*"Compared with Ref. [4], we do not need any unitary rotations on the initial state, because our acceleration capacity is induced by the non-Markovian LEPs."* 加速来源不是初态工程投影掉慢模，而是非马尔可夫 LEP 增大谱隙。

### **Potential applications in quantum energy devices**

非马尔可夫效应在非平衡动力学中的作用得到深化，潜在应用是优化量子能量器件：*"our findings may have potential applications in optimizing the performances of quantum energy devices."* 结合补充材料中量子电池放电加速的说明，QMPE 可作为加快能量或信息传输的动力学资源。

---

研究支持来自中国国家自然科学基金、中央高校基本科研业务费、甘肃省自然科学基金和 “111 Center”。具体基金号包括：*"National Natural Science Foundation of China (Grants No. 12375015 and No. 12247101)"*、*"Fundamental Research Funds for the Central Universities (Grant No. luzjbky-2025-jdzx07)"*、*"Natural Science Foundation of Gansu Province (Grants No. 22JR5RA389 and No. 25JRRA799)"* 以及 *"the '111 Center' under Grant No. B20063."*

## Data availability
